events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer for compliance check. Need decide pass/fail. Scenario: missed weld per drawing (DOC). Production welding, rough-complete. Reference AWS D1.1/D1.3, shop WPS. Missed weld per drawing is non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk? Structural weld missing could be high or critical depending on component. In manufacturing floor, missed weld per drawing is a defect; risk high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Work stage rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 80. Findings: weld omitted per drawing. Actions: add missing weld per WPS/drawing, inspect, update docs. Rationale. References: AWS D1.1/D1.3, shop WPS, drawing. Need output exactly JSON. Ensure valid JSON. No prose.
